overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: ICMP traffic integration uses Packetbeat to capture ICMP (Internet Control Message Protocol) traffic. By monitoring ping requests, network error messages, and path detection data, it helps you identify network connectivity issues, latency problems, and routing failures.

items.title: Connectivity Detection
items.description: Monitor ping requests and replies to identify network reachability issues

items.title: Latency Analysis
items.description: Calculate RTT (Round-Trip Time) to analyze network latency

items.title: Error Detection
items.description: Capture Destination Unreachable, Time Exceeded and other error messages

items.title: Path Tracing
items.description: Analyze traceroute data to understand network path

fieldTables.title: Parsed Fields
fieldTables.description: ICMP traffic will be parsed into the following structured fields:
